channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Three sons of Iran's slain leader Khamenei appear at funeral, not Mojtaba

Matched Titles:
- Sons of Iran’s leader Ali Khamenei attend funeral, but Mojtaba is absent

- Three sons of Iran's slain leader appear at funeral, not his successor
- Mojtaba Khamenei misses father’s funeral
- Three sons of Iran's slain leader Khamenei appear at funeral, not his successor

- Three sons of Iran's slain leader Khamenei appear at funeral, not his successor
- Iran’s supreme leader absent from funeral of father Ali Khamenei
- Khamenei’s sons attend funeral prayers in Tehran
- Iran holds funeral for Ali Khamenei: Who is attending?
